get.description: The pytest session was initiated on a Linux platform with Python version 3.12.12, pytest-9.0.2, and pluggy-1.6.0. The root directory for the test is '/var/tmp/Roost/RoostGPT/pw-api-pytest-github-claude-1773396388743/841094f5-2643-4153-b550-89b554962982/source/api-spec/tests/EMPLOYEE_SERVICE'. Only one test item was collected, 'test_employees_id_get.py', which ended in an error. The error occurred during the setup of the test 'test_get_employee_by_id'. It is an AttributeError stating that the 'SubRequest' object has no attribute 'param'. This error occurred in 'conftest.py' at line 56. The test session completed with one error in 0.30 seconds.

post.description:
The pytest session was run on a Linux platform with Python version 3.12.12, pytest version 9.0.2, and pluggy version 1.6.0. The root directory for the tests was located in the EMPLOYEE_SERVICE folder of the RoostGPT project. Two tests were collected for execution: test_add_employee and test_add_employee_smoke, both located in the test_employees_post.py file.

Both tests failed during the setup phase due to an AttributeError. The error occurred in the load_endpoint_test_data fixture, where the 'SubRequest' object had no 'param' attribute. This error prevented the tests from running and resulted in a total of 2 errors in 0.20 seconds.

get.description:
The pytest session was run on a Linux platform using Python 3.12.12, pytest-9.0.2, and pluggy-1.6.0. The test was conducted on four items in the EMPLOYEE_SERVICE directory. Out of the four tests, one resulted in an error and three failed.

The error occurred during the setup of the test_get_employees due to an AttributeError. The 'SubRequest' object had no attribute 'param'.

The three failures occurred in the following tests: test_get_employees_invalid_auth, test_get_employees_missing_auth, and test_get_employees_expired_token. 

In the first two failed tests, an InvalidSchema exception was raised because no connection adapters were found for the given URL. 

In the third failed test, an AttributeError was raised because a 'NoneType' object had no attribute 'get'. 

The test session completed in 0.26 seconds.
